cashPct.description: Cash/credit as a ratio of realized equity (cash + invested capital, excluding open P&L). Decimal fraction: 0.5 = 50%.

cashOfTotalEquityPct.description: Cash/credit as a ratio of total equity (cash + invested capital + open P&L). Decimal fraction: 0.5 = 50%.

assets.description: Per-instrument breakdown. Mirror allocations are excluded.
